commands.description: Reads, converts, and generates DTOs from all Lucid Models
Reads, converts, and generates vine validators from all Lucid Models

flags.name: model
flags.description: Specify a model to build the DTO from

flags.name: validator
flags.description: Generate a validator alongside the DTO

args.description: Name of the DTO. If a model matches the provided name, it'll be used to generate the DTO
